basic_details.job_title: NABCONS Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NABARD Consultancy Services (NABCONS) has released the official Junior Consultant Notification 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NABCONS Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 25–35 years with an MBA or Graduate degree with IT/Computers as a subject and minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA can apply online until 24 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBA / Graduate with IT/Computers as a subject with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: Junior Consultant: MBA / Graduate with IT/Computers as a subject with minimum 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Minimum 3 years' experience on promoting or financing Farmers' Collectives/Agribusiness Activities /Non-Agri Marketing/ Value Chain Management/Networking with Govt. Agencies/Banks working with NGOs/VAs etc.

selection_process: Interview Assessment for proficiency in MS Office/ data management
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NABCONS Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABCONS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference. NABCONS Junior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links Link Description Link Official Notification PDF Click here Apply Online Click here Official Website Click here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Consultant position at NABCONS?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting online applications for the Junior Consultant position at NABCONS is 24 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Consultant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA or a Graduate degree with IT/Computers as a subject, securing a minimum of 60% marks or an equivalent CGPA to be eligible for the Junior Consultant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Consultant position is between a minimum of 25 years and a maximum of 35 years. Specific age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Consultant position will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Consultant post in this recruitment drive by NABCONS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Consultant position is strictly online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job for the Junior Consultant position?
faq.answer: The Junior Consultant position is a project-based role, meaning the employment is for a specific project duration as determined by NABCONS.

faq.question: Q8. What experience is required for the Junior Consultant role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of experience is required in promoting or financing Farmers' Collectives/Agribusiness Activities, Non-Agri Marketing, Value Chain Management, or networking with government agencies/banks working with NGOs/VAs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Consultant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Consultant position will involve an interview and an assessment of proficiency in MS Office and data management skills.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to review the notification before applying.
